description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, rendered in a rough, expressive style with visible textural details and an unfinished appearance. The figure stands with legs apart and arms raised, as if in the midst of a dynamic action or gesture. The surface is predominantly white, with a matte, chalky finish that suggests plaster or a similar material. The base is a flat, rectangular platform resembling wooden planks, providing stability and a contrasting texture to the figure. The anatomy is stylized, with exaggerated musculature and a sense of movement captured in the pose. The overall impression is one of raw energy and artistic spontaneity.
description: A rough-textured white sculpture of a standing human figure with raised arms, mounted on a wooden plank-like base. The piece is expressive and dynamic, with a matte, unfinished surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full stance of the figure, with both legs apart and arms raised, highlighting the muscular torso and expressive posture.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the figure and the thickness of the base, with the arm and leg positions creating a sense of forward motion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back musculature and the way the legs are positioned on the base, with the rough texture clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the figure, the curvature of the torso, and the uneven, organic surface details.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a wooden platform, suggesting an indoor or outdoor exhibition space, but no specific environmental context is visible.
